name: LTC PROPERTIES INC
summary: LTC Properties, Inc. is a Maryland-incorporated REIT founded in 1992 that invests primarily in seniors housing and health care properties. Its portfolio includes independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing facilities operated through triple-net leases, financing receivables, mortgage loans, notes receivable, unconsolidated joint ventures, and a SHOP segment. As of December 31, 2025, total net investments were approximately $2.0 billion across 186 properties in multiple states.
